state_space: Civilizational growth trajectory through the Kardashev scale
dynamics_operator: Exponential technological expansion vs quadratic increase in systemic risk
perturbation_operator: Nuclear war, AI unalignment, synthetic plague, climate collapse
failure_mode: FILTER_EXIT (Sudden cessation of detectable electromagnetic signal / extinction)

observable_metrics.name: Sustainability Margin
observable_metrics.estimator: Planetary resource regenerative rate / consumption rate

edge_conditions: One-way irreversibility (Extinction is a terminal sink)
B4 symbolic complexity grows faster than B3 coordination capacity
notes: Tests B4 (Symbolic Depth) saturation where the tools exceed the agents' ability to coordinate safely.
